title: Watermelon and Paneer Salad
description: A refreshing summer salad with the sweetness of watermelon, crunch of nuts and creaminess of paneer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine diced watermelon and crumbled paneer.
In a small pan, toast the shredded coconut over low heat until lightly browned.
Add the toasted coconut, chopped nuts and sliced banana to the bowl with watermelon and paneer.
Drizzle the honey over the salad and toss to combine.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional chopped nuts if desired.
